# Bookary

> A Malayalam-first community library catalog — browse books by rack code, genre and writer, rent titles, join waitlists, keep a reading diary, and review what you've read.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Featured books, recent additions, and what the community is reading.
- [Search](/search): Search the full catalog by title, author, genre, or shelf code.
- [Genres](/genres): Browse by genre (നോവൽ, കഥ, കവിത, and more).
- [Writers](/writers): Browse books by author.
- [Loved](/loved): Most-loved books across the community.
- [Diary](/diary): Public reading diary entries and reviews.

## Optional

- [Sitemap](/sitemap.xml): Machine-readable list of indexable URLs.
